new_value: {"assignee":"Bikal Gurung","status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"pgsql-4hy","title":"Fail fast on re-entrant client usage inside stream/COPY callbacks","description":"Callbacks passed to RowStream::for_each, Client::copy_out handler, and Client::copy_in writer currently execute while operation_guard is held. If callback code issues another DB operation on the same Client, it can self-deadlock waiting for the same lock. Add a fail-fast re-entrancy guard and tests.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:41:42Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:41:42Z"}

new_value: {"assignee":"Bikal Gurung","status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"pgsql-wc7","title":"Treat decoder/protocol ErrorResponse as fatal in wait_for_notification","description":"Client::wait_for_notification currently ignores non-notification backend messages. Decoder hardening can synthesize ErrorResponse for malformed frames; wait loop must raise ServerError immediately instead of continuing.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:41:42Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:41:42Z"}

new_value: Implemented fail-fast re-entrancy guard via ClientUsageError; wrapped stream/COPY callbacks and added regressions (client_wbtest + integration tests).
wait_for_notification now raises ServerError immediately on ErrorResponse; added unit regression test for helper.

{"description":"Pool acquire currently checks closed only before waiting on the semaphore. If the pool closes while a caller is waiting, acquire can still return a client. Add a post-permit closed recheck, release permit correctly, and ensure blocked acquires fail with PoolError during close."}
old_value: {"id":"pgsql-jrm.1","title":"Fix Pool::acquire/Pool::close race that can return clients after close","description":"Pool::acquire checks  only before semaphore wait. If pool closes while caller waits, acquire may still return a client. Add post-permit closed recheck, release permit correctly, and ensure blocked acquires fail with PoolError when pool is closing.","acceptance_criteria":"Concurrent test proves acquire fails after close even when waiting on semaphore; no permit leak; existing pool tests still pass.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T17:04:36Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T17:04:36Z"}

new_value: {"description":"Decoder currently skips malformed frames (length too small and payload BufferUnderflow) and BufferReader cstring accepts unterminated strings. Tighten parser behavior to surface protocol errors immediately and trigger deterministic connection-level failure/resync instead of silent skip."}
old_value: {"id":"pgsql-jrm.2","title":"Make decoder malformed-frame handling fail-fast and strict","description":"Decoder currently skips malformed frames (, BufferUnderflow payload parse) and BufferReader::cstring accepts unterminated strings. Tighten parser to surface protocol errors immediately and force connection-level failure/resync strategy rather than silent skip.","acceptance_criteria":"Malformed length, truncated payload, and unterminated cstring all surface deterministic fatal errors; tests updated to match strict behavior.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T17:04:36Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T17:04:36Z"}

old_value: {"id":"pgsql-jrm.3","title":"Refactor notification queue to O(1) FIFO operations","description":"Replace notification_queue pop path that rebuilds arrays on each dequeue with an O(1) queue strategy (head index or ring buffer). Preserve FIFO ordering for poll_notifications and wait_for_notification.","acceptance_criteria":"Functional notification tests pass; dequeue path avoids per-pop array rebuild; add regression test for order and high-volume dequeue.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T17:05:02Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T17:05:02Z"}

new_value: {"assignee":"Bikal Gurung","status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"pgsql-jrm.6","title":"Preserve structured callback errors in COPY paths","description":"COPY currently stringifies callback errors into CopyError text. Improve error propagation so callers can inspect structured cause while still guaranteeing protocol drain to ReadyForQuery.","acceptance_criteria":"COPY callback error retains original cause or structured wrapping; tests verify typed handling and connection usability after failure.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T17:05:02Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T17:05:02Z"}

new_value: Implemented NotificationQueue head-index FIFO with amortized O(1) dequeue and added connection_wbtest high-volume/order regressions
Added structured CopyCallbackError(CopyCallbackFailure) propagation for COPY callbacks while preserving drain-to-ready behavior; updated tests
Added post-permit close checks in Pool::acquire, wake-on-close semaphore release, and regression test for close-while-waiting acquire
Made malformed decoder frames fail-fast, enforced unterminated cstring errors, and updated strict decoder regressions
{"assignee":"Bikal Gurung","status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"pgsql-jrm.4","title":"Reduce allocation churn in decoder and batched writes","description":"Optimize hot-path buffer handling: avoid repeated full-buffer compaction/copies in Decoder parse, and reduce repeated byte pushing in Connection send_all. Keep protocol semantics unchanged.","acceptance_criteria":"Micro-bench or stress test demonstrates lower allocations or better throughput; protocol tests remain green.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T17:05:02Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T17:05:02Z"}

Remove duplicated match loops where practical without changing behavior.","acceptance_criteria":"Existing behavior preserved; duplicate message-handling code reduced; targeted regression tests cover shared dispatcher semantics.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T17:05:02Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T17:05:02Z"}

new_value: Optimized Connection::send_all with pre-sized batch encoding and reduced decoder buffer churn via head-offset + threshold compaction; added stress regression coverage
Consolidated backend dispatch through shared classifier/dispatcher and shared ErrorResponse extraction helpers across client/copy/stream/connection paths

new_value: Reworked pool close wake logic with synthetic permit accounting to avoid semaphore over-release aborts; added regressions for idle close, post-close release accounting, and multi-waiter wake behavior
